vibe: Clinical precision meets human warmth. High-end, moody, data-driven like Oura or Whoop.

rules.headings: Tracking tight, clean formatting. No generic default weights.
rules.data_metrics: Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric values, scores, and technical data.
rules.hierarchy: H1 up to text-5xl, fluid scaling. Strict adherence to hierarchy gap.

layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: Bento Control Room grid layout. Tightly packed (gap-6) on desktop, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4.
layout_spacing.surfaces: Glassmorphism with 1px border. bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl.
layout_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense data.

wellness_score.name: Biometric Orbital Ring
wellness_score.description: An elegant, glowing radial SVG visualization representing the wellness score. Features layered concentric rings with dashed arrays and subtle drop-shadows (drop-shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(216,107,69,0.4)]) to mimic living biometric telemetry.

insights_card.name: Oura-style Insight Cards
insights_card.description: Dark, glassmorphic cards with muted textures. Use subtle gradients for the inner ring and bold mono-font metrics. Must use border-white/10 and backdrop-blur-2xl.

buttons.primary: Solid #D86B45 background, #050505 text, subtle hover lift, rounded-full or rounded-xl.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, border-white/20, text-white, hover:bg-white/10, rounded-xl.

data_testids.rule: Every interactive and critical info element MUST have a data-testid. Format: kebab-case role-based (e.g., 'wellness-score-ring', 'nav-home-link').

micro_interactions.load_state: Framer motion staggered fade-in for dashboard tiles.

abstract_background.description: Dark rippling water texture for subtle background noise or auth screen background.

user_avatar.description: Elegant portrait for user profile in the header.

nutrition_placeholder.description: Gourmet salad on dark plate for nutrition history items.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY .jsx or .js extensions for React components. Do not use .tsx.
Strictly follow the color palette provided in this JSON. DO NOT use generic Tailwind blues, purples, or teals.
Implement the 'Biometric Orbital Ring' using an SVG with Recharts or custom pure React+SVG with stroke-dasharray.
All cards must have a 1px border (border-white/10) and backdrop-blur-xl to mimic high-end glassmorphism over a #050505 base.
Inject JetBrains Mono for all numeric readouts.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY button, link, form input, and main data display tile.
Ensure 'react-icons' or '@phosphor-icons/react' are used. Install them if needed.
Keep text contrast strictly WCAG AA or APCA compliant. Body text must be at least #A1A1AA against the dark background.
Avoid using Shadcn standard Card elements if they conflict with the 1px white/10 border + backdrop-blur aesthetic. Build raw HTML + Tailwind where needed for layouts.
Ensure the application structure connects the frontend React (Vite) app to the FastAPI backend with MongoDB.
